title: Trust and Public Support for Environmental Protection in Diverse National Contexts

tax_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: willing to pay much higher taxes in order to protect the environment
tax_mentions.context: ISSP survey item measuring support for environmental protection.
tax_mentions.notes: Generic environmental tax support, not carbon/fuel-specific.

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Refers to environmental pricing generally, not a specified carbon or fuel tax.

inclusion_reason: Analyzes support for environmental protection using generic higher-tax items, but not a direct carbon or fuel tax instrument.
exclusion_reason: No direct analysis of carbon, CO2, gasoline, diesel, fossil-fuel, or other fuel-specific tax support; only generic environmental taxes.
